title: Resolution Condemning the Killing of Honorable Mayor Caesar Pabalate Perez, the Wanton Disregard for Human Rights and Human Life, and Therefore Requesting All Government Powers and Authorities for Speedy Investigation and Resolution of the Case and to Bring Forth the Culprits Into the Hands of Justice. (AUTHORS: COUNCILOR(S) Josephine S. Evangelista, Miko C. Pelegrina, Janos S. Lapiz, Geronimo A. Ciceron, Marlo Pj A. Alipon, Mike Dexter A. Concio, Mark Lester B. Dizon, Cris Dayril B. Bagnes
